name: cloudflared
title: Cloudflare Tunnel
description: Expose local services to the internet securely without port forwarding. Zero-config HTTPS, DDoS protection, and access control via Cloudflare's network. Free tier available.

variables.name: CLOUDFLARE_TUNNEL_TOKEN
variables.label: Tunnel Token
variables.description: Token from Cloudflare Zero Trust dashboard (create at dash.teams.cloudflare.com)
